criteria.name: AI-Powered Personalization
criteria.description: The app uses AI to personalize the shopping experience, providing tailored product recommendations, search results, and content based on user behavior and preferences.

criteria.name: AI Chatbot Assistance
criteria.description: The app incorporates an AI chatbot to assist customers with product searches, answer questions, provide support, and offer personalized recommendations in real-time.

criteria.name: AI-Driven Product Discovery
criteria.description: The app utilizes AI algorithms to enhance product discovery, enabling users to find relevant items more efficiently through intelligent search, image recognition, and contextual understanding.

criteria.name: Customer Service Automation
criteria.description: The app employs AI to automate customer service interactions, such as answering frequently asked questions, resolving issues, and providing support, improving efficiency and response times.

criteria.name: Integration with E-commerce Platforms
criteria.description: The app seamlessly integrates with popular e-commerce platforms like Shopify, allowing merchants to leverage AI capabilities to enhance their online stores and improve the customer experience.
